offer: For construction contractors managing 5-10 projects simultaneously, inefficient scheduling causes project delays. We automate equipment maintenance tracking instead of manual tracking via spreadsheets or paper logs.
problem: Inefficient scheduling and tracking of equipment maintenance leading to project delays.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for construction contractors
Indie Hackers posts discussing scheduling tools
DM outreach to construction contractors with demo video
Community forums for sharing construction management tools
try_it: Let users try simple scheduling interface and tracking log for maintenance history on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing the manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post a weekly progress update in a relevant community
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
